docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LITTON, GLENN AS TO DEFENDANT ROEMERS, HAYLEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LITTON, GLENN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF GLENN LITTON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAYLEE ROEMERS IS PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SHERIFF'S SERVICE FEE OF $40 WAIVED) SERVED SEP-27-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROEMERS, HAYLEE
